title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
summary: Google Cloud announced advancements to Looker, its business intelligence platform, including dashboard agents that automate workflows and insights, shared pre-trained agents, and Conversational Analytics. The system grounds AI in a governed semantic layer to enable agentic capabilities while maintaining data governance and consistency.
writeup: This video from Google Cloud Tech covers new Looker capabilities aimed at business users, including dashboard agents that automate workflows and surface insights, shared pre-trained agents, and Conversational Analytics. The central design point is grounding the AI in a governed semantic layer, which supports agentic features while preserving data governance and consistency. The takeaway: Looker is adding multi-agent and conversational functions on top of its existing semantic model rather than bypassing it, keeping metrics consistent as automation expands.
